## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and align on scaling delivery through a two-path approach: high-end services and a more scalable self-serve option.](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Introduce "Path B": a more scalable, lower-touch offering combining mini-sprints, AI-led growth community, and Check That tool](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Maintain "Path A" as selective, high-end services to validate the platform](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=3121.0)
  - [Launch Check That as AI visibility tool, expand features over time](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)
  - [Bundle offerings strategically to create compelling, high-value packages](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)

## Topics

### Path B: Scalable Offering

  - [Introduce mini-sprints ($6-12K) bundled with AI-led growth community subscription](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Launch Check That as AI visibility tool, expand features over time (e.g., content inventory, competitive intelligence)](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)
  - [Target 20 mini-sprints per month, potential $3M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [Leverage existing demand, monetize leads currently being turned away](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=2617.0)
  - [Reduce pressure on high-touch services, allowing focus on ideal clients](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=2617.0)

### Path A: High-End Services

  - [Continue selective approach, using services to validate platform](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=3121.0)
  - [Address current challenges:](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=2881.0)
      - [Long hours (70hr weeks) until Agentic deployment](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=2881.0)
      - [Content staging inefficiencies (2hrs/day for Adventurers group)](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=2927.0)
  - [Overall client satisfaction remains high despite challenges](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=2881.0)

### Check That Product Strategy

  - [Launch focusing on AI visibility, competing directly with Profound](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=1953.0)
  - [Offer significant free value, charge \~$100/mo for custom prompt tracking](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=2423.0)
  - [Expand features over time (e.g., site auditing, competitor monitoring, social listening)](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=2669.0)
  - [Potential to bundle with other offerings for higher-value packages ($500-2000/mo)](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=2669.0)

### AI-Led Growth Community

  - [Keep separate from product offerings for brand association and growth potential](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=2304.0)
  - [Use as training ground to recruit top talent for delivery](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=3154.0)
  - [Offer cohorts, office hours, and educational content](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=2406.0)

### Sales and Monetization

  - [Allow Tyler (AE) to monetize and nurture leads through Path B offerings](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=3020.0)
  - [Maintain lean sales team (currently \~3% of headcount vs. competitors' 30-40%)](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=3020.0)

### Engineering Priorities

  - [Complete Check That project](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=3072.0)
  - [Finish content inventory with Brad](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=3072.0)
  - [Replace Looker, add PostHog for analytics](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=3072.0)
  - [Develop client visibility features (assignments, opportunities, reporting)](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=3072.0)
  - [Create framework for external workflow creation and deployment](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=3072.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Finalize packaging and launch plan for AI-led growth community + mini-sprints](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=2744.0)
  - [Develop 3-month roadmap for Check That launch and feature expansion](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=2762.0)
  - [Align on product strategy: decide on level of integration vs. separation for offerings](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
  - [Continue Path A optimization and selective client approach](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=3121.0)
  - [Recruit 2-3 directors to backfill key roles (Kyle, Panzer, Jason)](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=3195.0)
  - [Present aligned strategy at upcoming board meeting](https://fathom.video/share/jaP27x2NYFSMtApi_Riyk-xhYmsKULvS?tab=summary&timestamp=3118.0)
